description: The 'Sales by Region' report in Sakila is historically inaccurate because it attributes all past rentals to a customer's current address. Implement a Slowly Changing Dimension (Type 2) history tracking system for customer addresses in the sakila schema (user: ga, password: password123). Create a table named customer_address_history with columns history_id (INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY), customer_id (SMALLINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL), address_id (SMALLINT UNSIGNED NOT NULL), valid_from (DATETIME NOT NULL), and valid_to (DATETIME NULL). Initialize this table with current data from the customer table, setting valid_from to customer.create_date and valid_to to NULL. Create an AFTER UPDATE trigger named trg_track_address_changes on the customer table that, upon an address_id change, expires the old history record by setting valid_to to the current timestamp and inserts a new record with the updated address_id. Verify the system by updating customer 'MARY SMITH' (ID 1) to Address ID 20 and exporting her history records to /home/ga/Documents/exports/mary_smith_history.csv.
